note: Every engagement starts with a short discovery call so I can size the work, agree on scope, and recommend the right paid engagement.
scarcity: Retainer slots typically fill 2-3 months ahead

tiers.description: Dedicated technical guidance delivered through focused sessions. I review your architecture, identify risks and opportunities, and provide written recommendations with clear next steps. Ideal for vetting decisions, modernization planning, compliance readiness, or resolving complex infrastructure challenges.

Well-defined projects delivered with complete documentation. All code arrives via pull request with comprehensive runbooks. A detailed proposal is agreed upfront so there are no surprises. Examples: CI/CD pipeline setup, infrastructure-as-code, containerization, cloud migrations, compliance hardening, or deployment automation.
features: All code delivered via pull request

tiers.description: Ongoing hands-on engineering with flexible hours and responsiveness. Pick the capacity that fits your team: Starter ($800/week), Standard ($1,500/week), or Premium ($3,000/week). Same-day response, weekly syncs, and priority access.
